message:
fix(extensions): use Copy semantics for HostCapability params + export matrix JSON

- Change build_behaviors() and is_required_cell() to accept
  HostCapability by value instead of by reference, since it
  implements Copy — cleaner API and avoids unnecessary indirection
- Update all test call sites to pass values instead of references
- Add generated conformance matrix JSON export (2252 lines) at
  docs/extension-conformance-matrix.json for documentation and
  CI validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
